subcodes.first_line: O God! O Quickener of souls, Reviver of bodies, and Sender of winds! I beseech Thee to shower Thy grace upon these two faithful servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا محیی الارواح و منعش الاشباح و مرسل الاریاح انی ارجوک ان تسقی العبدین الصادقین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
